name: Cold Avocado Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 teaspoons instant minced onion or grated onion
crumbled bacon and minced parsley for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mashed avocado, lemon juice, salt, onion (either chopped or minced), and Tabasco sauce in a blender.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Add the sour cream and blend again.
4. Add the chicken broth and blend once more.
5. Chill thoroughly before serving.
6. Serve in chilled soup bowls garnished with crumbled bacon and minced parsley. An optional garnish is a sprig of cilantro.
7. Serves 4 to 6 people.
